title: Traxdor Garden Route - Proud winner of Best Door & Window Security
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Traxdor Garden Route is...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Traxdor Garden Route is honoured to be named Best Door & Window Security in the 2025 Best of Mossel Bay Awards.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Traxdor Garden Route is honoured to be named Best Door & Window Security in the 2025 Best of Mossel Bay Awards."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This recognition is a reflection of the trust our clients place in us and the hard work of our dedicated team who go above and beyond every day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our journey began in 2005 as part of a proudly family-run group of businesses. What started with Aqua Regia, providing trusted water purification solutions, soon expanded into security with Traxdor, offering premium door and window barriers that keep homes safe while complementing their style. Later, Toilet Friend Garden Route joined the family – adding a unique hygiene solution to our portfolio.","html":"Our journey began in 2005 as part of a proudly family-run group of businesses. What started with Aqua Regia, providing trusted water purification solutions, soon expanded into security with Traxdor, offering premium door and window barriers that keep homes safe while complementing their style. Later, Toilet Friend Garden Route joined the family – adding a unique hygiene solution to our portfolio."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the heart of everything we do is our commitment to service, innovation and customer satisfaction. We believe in listening to our clients, continuously upgrading our product lines, and providing reliable, value-for-money solutions. Most importantly, we believe that true quality comes with a personal touch.","html":"At the heart of everything we do is our commitment to service, innovation and customer satisfaction. We believe in listening to our clients, continuously upgrading our product lines, and providing reliable, value-for-money solutions. Most importantly, we believe that true quality comes with a personal touch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This award belongs not only to us, but to our loyal clients for voting, and to our hardworking team for delivering excellence day after day.","html":"This award belongs not only to us, but to our loyal clients for voting, and to our hardworking team for delivering excellence day after day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you, Mossel Bay, for trusting us with your safety and for celebrating local business.","html":"Thank you, Mossel Bay, for trusting us with your safety and for celebrating local business."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Call us on: 072 119 3542","html":"Call us on: 072 119 3542"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"https://www.facebook.com/TraXdorGardenRoute","html":"https://www.facebook.com/TraXdorGardenRoute"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Manager Marinus de Korte.","html":"Manager Marinus de Korte."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
